Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​Boolean>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BooleanVerifier, PrimitiveBooleanVerifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractBooleanVerifier, BooleanVerifierImpl, BooleanVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierImpl, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp
public interface ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>
extends ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​Boolean>
Verifies the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a BooleanVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S isFalse()
    Ensures that the actual value is false.
    S isTrue()
    Ensures that the actual value is true.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isTrue

      S isTrue()
      Ensures that the actual value is true.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not true

    • isFalse

      S isFalse()
      Ensures that the actual value is false.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is not false
